name: James Acaster
bio: James Acaster is an English comedian, podcaster and actor known for whimsical, intricately structured stand-up and an offbeat persona. He was nominated for the Edinburgh Comedy Award a record five consecutive years and released the four-part Netflix special Repertoire in 2018. He co-hosts the food podcast Off Menu and the panel show Hypothetical.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up after leaving a band
First of five consecutive Edinburgh Comedy Award nominations
Releases the four-part special Repertoire on Netflix
Co-launches the Off Menu podcast with Ed Gamble
Performs the acclaimed show Cold Lasagne Hate Myself 1999
Publishes the book James Acaster Guide to Quitting Social Media

accolades: Five consecutive Edinburgh Comedy Award nominations (2012 to 2016)
Repertoire praised as an innovative reinvention of the stand-up special
Best-selling author and host of the hit Off Menu podcast
